issue.message: For `minSdkVersion`=29 only `android:` attributes should be used
Duplicate id `@+id/txtContinueTitle`, already defined earlier in this layout
Duplicate id `@+id/txtContinueProgress`, already defined earlier in this layout
Duplicate id `@+id/btnContinue`, already defined earlier in this layout
Duplicate id `@+id/txtReminder`, already defined earlier in this layout
Duplicate id `@+id/btnSetReminder`, already defined earlier in this layout
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Should use `app:showAsAction` with the appcompat library with `xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"`
The application should not provide its own launch screen
A newer version of com.android.application than 8.13.2 is available: 9.1.0
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-core than 1.3.0 is available: 1.5.3
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-camera2 than 1.3.0 is available: 1.5.3

A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-view than 1.3.0 is available: 1.5.3

A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-core than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage.class)`
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/ef_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.EnglishFlow`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/ef_background` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.EnglishFlow`)

Custom view ``MaterialCardView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
issue.errorLine1: holder.metaText.setText("So lan fail: " + item.failCount + " • Alias goi y: " + alias);

issue.message: String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
